description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 26, 2025 at 12:49 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Daly City, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Mission Street at E. Market Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on Mission Street in the second to the rightmost lane and crossing the intersection with E. 
Market Street at a green light. While the Waymo AV was crossing the intersection, a passenger car traveling ahead of the Waymo AV in the 
adjacent third to the right lane crossed the dashed lane line into the Waymo AV’s lane of travel and the right side of the passenger car made 
contact with the front left side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
